all.en: Subject: Upcoming Office Renovation — What You Need to Know
all.zh: 主旨：辦公室即將裝修 — 您需了解的事項

all.en: Dear All,
all.zh: 親愛的同仁，

all.en: We are writing to share details about our upcoming office renovation.
all.zh: 我們在此說明即將進行的辦公室裝修細節。

all.en: The renovation will begin on Monday, July 7th.
all.zh: 裝修工程將於 7 月 7 日星期一開始。

all.en: Work is scheduled to last approximately two weeks.
all.zh: 工程預計持續約兩週。

all.en: The project aims to modernize our open workspace areas.
all.zh: 本案目標為現代化開放式辦公區域。

all.en: Improvements include new lighting, flooring, and meeting pods.
all.zh: 改善項目包含全新照明、地板與會議艙。

all.en: We expect minor disruptions during this period.
all.zh: 此期間預期將有輕微影響。

all.en: Please review the seating arrangements outlined below carefully.
all.zh: 請仔細閱讀下方說明的座位安排。

all.en: All employees on the fourth floor will relocate temporarily.
all.zh: 四樓所有員工將暫時搬遷。

all.en: New seating assignments are posted on the intranet.
all.zh: 新座位表已公告於內部網站。

all.en: Please pack your personal items before Friday, July 4th.
all.zh: 請於 7 月 4 日星期五前打包個人物品。

all.en: Moving boxes will be provided on each desk that morning.
all.zh: 當日早上每張辦公桌將備有搬運箱。

all.en: Label your box clearly with your name and new seat number.
all.zh: 請於箱上清楚標示姓名與新座位號碼。

all.en: Our facilities team will transport boxes over the weekend.
all.zh: 總務團隊將於週末搬運箱子。

all.en: You can unpack at your temporary desk Monday morning.
all.zh: 您可於週一早上於暫時座位拆箱。

all.en: Temporary seats are located on the third and fifth floors.
all.zh: 暫時座位位於三樓與五樓。

all.en: Network connections and phone lines will be ready by then.
all.zh: 屆時網路與電話線路將就緒可用。

all.en: If you experience any technical issues, please contact IT.
all.zh: 如遇技術問題請聯絡資訊部。

all.en: Noise levels will be highest between 10 a.m. and 2 p.m.
all.zh: 噪音時段集中於上午十點至下午兩點。

all.en: We recommend scheduling focused tasks outside these hours.
all.zh: 建議將需專注的工作安排於此時段外。

all.en: Early morning and late afternoon should remain quieter.
all.zh: 清晨與傍晚預期較為安靜。

all.en: Construction crews will pause work during the lunch hour.
all.zh: 施工團隊將於午餐時間暫停作業。

all.en: Heavy demolition is scheduled only on Mondays and Tuesdays.
all.zh: 重型拆除作業僅安排於週一與週二。

all.en: Painting and finishing happen later in each week.
all.zh: 粉刷與收尾工程安排於每週後段。

all.en: Noise-cancelling headphones are available for borrowing.
all.zh: 降噪耳機可供借用。

all.en: Please request them from the General Affairs front desk.
all.zh: 請至總務部櫃台借用。

all.en: Returns are expected at the end of each business day.
all.zh: 請於每日下班前歸還。

all.en: Meeting rooms on the fourth floor will be unavailable.
all.zh: 四樓會議室將暫停使用。

all.en: Three alternative rooms have been set up on the sixth floor.
all.zh: 六樓已設置三間替代會議室。

all.en: Please use the updated booking system to reserve them.
all.zh: 請使用更新後的預約系統進行預訂。

all.en: Each room is equipped with video conferencing tools.
all.zh: 每間會議室皆配備視訊會議設備。

all.en: Whiteboards and screens are also available in each space.
all.zh: 白板與螢幕亦設置於各空間。

all.en: For smaller chats, two new phone booths are now open.
all.zh: 如進行小型對談，兩間新電話亭已開放使用。

all.en: These provide privacy for calls and one-on-one meetings.
all.zh: 可提供通話與一對一會議的隱私空間。

all.en: Booths can be reserved for thirty-minute blocks.
all.zh: 電話亭可預約三十分鐘為單位。

all.en: Remote work options are extended during the renovation.
all.zh: 裝修期間將擴大遠距工作彈性。

all.en: You may work from home up to three days per week.
all.zh: 您可每週在家工作最多三天。

all.en: Please coordinate schedules with your direct manager.
all.zh: 請與直屬主管協調您的工作時程。

all.en: Team meetings should still occur at least once weekly in person.
all.zh: 團隊會議仍應每週至少一次實體出席。

all.en: Lunch service in the cafeteria continues as usual.
all.zh: 員工餐廳午餐服務照常營運。

all.en: However, the seating area will be slightly smaller.
all.zh: 但用餐座位區將略為縮減。

all.en: Consider eating at staggered times to reduce crowding.
all.zh: 建議錯開用餐時間以減少擁擠。

all.en: Outdoor patio seating is also available when weather permits.
all.zh: 天氣允許時亦可於戶外露台用餐。

all.en: Restrooms on the fourth floor will close during the project.
all.zh: 工程期間四樓洗手間將關閉。

all.en: Please use facilities on the third or fifth floor instead.
all.zh: 請改用三樓或五樓的設施。

all.en: Elevators will continue normal operation throughout.
all.zh: 電梯將全程正常運作。

all.en: Stairwells may be used for emergency access only.
all.zh: 樓梯間僅供緊急通行使用。

all.en: Safety signage will be posted at all affected entrances.
all.zh: 所有受影響入口將張貼安全告示。

all.en: Please follow all instructions from construction supervisors.
all.zh: 請遵循施工監督人員的所有指示。

all.en: Visitors should be informed of these changes in advance.
all.zh: 請事先告知訪客相關變更。

all.en: Photos of the transformation will be posted on the intranet.
all.zh: 改造照片將公告於內部網站。

all.en: We appreciate your patience during this brief inconvenience.
all.zh: 感謝您於這段短暫不便期間的耐心配合。

all.en: Respectfully yours,
all.zh: 敬上，

all.en: Facilities Management Office
all.zh: 場館管理辦公室 敬上
